metadata.title: SkylightServices Bot - Discord bot for order processing | Portfolio work
metadata.description: Discord bot for SkylightServices studio, written in Python for accepting orders.

skylightservices_bot.info:
This is a Discord bot for a small studio specializing in Minecraft-related services. It implements order placement systems, review creation, and promo codes. The bot is written in Python and Disnake.

Order Placement

The process starts with a welcome message:/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/hello.webpThen you need to click the «Place Order» button:

(ordering happens in the customer's DMs, not on the server)/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/create_order1.png/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/create_order2.png/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/create_order3.pngAdditional contacts are specified via a modal window:/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/add_contacts_menu.pngAll collected data is saved to the database and automatically sent to a separate channel for performers, where they can accept the order./magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/order.pngAfter accepting the order, a new text channel is created in a special category, accessible only to the customer, performer, and studio owner. For some order types, additional questions are provided: right after creating the chat, the bot sends a message to clarify how exactly the work should be done.

Creating a Review

To leave a review, you need to go back to the welcome message and click the «Leave Review» button. After that, the questionnaire process will start:/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/create_review1.png/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/create_review2.pngThe review will be published in the designated channel.

Technical Support Interaction

A separate channel is allocated for technical support on the server, containing a single bot message with a dropdown menu:/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/support1.png/magnetar-site/img/skylightservices_bot/support2.pngWhen selecting the «Feedback» option, the process of creating a request begins, similar to order placement or review. The request is also saved to the database and sent for review to managers in a specially designated chat. For other menu items, the bot replies with pre-prepared text.

Promo Codes

The bot implements a promo code system. They are divided into two types:common_code — regular promo code for a discount up to 99%.service_code — code for a free additional service.Each promo code can have additional attributes:count_for_use — the total number of times this promo code can be activated.date — the time when the promo code will expire (specified down to minutes).users — list of users who have the right to activate the promo code.

Commands

For regular user

/send_report — command to send a complaint.

For manager

/summon_order_panel — summons the welcome message./summon_support_panel — sends the panel for technical support interaction./update_services_list — loads up-to-date service information into the forum channel.

For performer

/rp_guide — detailed guide on the resource pack with totem./check_my_salary — display earnings information for the month.

For owner

/add_promo_code — add a new promo code./remove_promo_code — remove promo code from the database./stop_take_order — stop processing new orders./get_salary_list — get current information about performers' earnings for the month.
